title: Ben-Chuwr #1133
definition:
Ben-hur = "son of whiteness" or "son of Chur"

 1) a man who was commissariat officer for Solomon in Mount Ephraim
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ben-hur = "son of whiteness" or "son of Chur"

 1) a man who was commissariat officer for Solomon in Mount Ephraim

    NASB:  son of Hur, one of Solomons leaders
